headline: Q1 Earnings Outperformers: D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) And The Rest Of The Home Builders Stocks
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) and the best and worst performers in the home builders industry.

headline: It might be time to start investing in housing-related stocks
